projects.title: Personal Website
projects.description: The website you're looking at right now. My personal portfolio and blog site. Made with pure HTML/JS/CSS.

projects.title: Sandbox-2D
projects.description: Build whatever your heart desires, survive the environment or simply play around - it's up to you. Sandbox-2D is a sandbox survival game where you can build, destroy and explore. Made with C++ and Raylib.

projects.title: 3D Toy Renderer
projects.description: 3D toy renderer capable of rendering 3D models from a list of vertices, lines and triangles. Made in 2 days with C and Raylib.

projects.title: Block Placer
projects.description: Game heavily inspired by Tetris. Play solo, battle against friends in versus or work together in co-op mode! Made with C++ and Raylib.

projects.title: Screen Simulation
projects.description: 2D screen simulator and sprite renderer capable of drawing rectangles and sprites. Supports all RGB colors. Made with C++ and SFML.

projects.title: CLL Interpreter
projects.description: A high-level interpreted scripting language inspired by Python and C++ made to be comfortable to use. Made with C++.
projects.image:
fn fibonacci(n) {
   return n unless n > 1
   fibonacci(n - 1) + fibonacci(n - 2)
}

fn main() {
   println(fibonacci(5))
}

projects.title: Dfunge
projects.description: 2D esoteric programming language based off Befunge-93 with file I/O, functions and other QOL elements. Made with C++.

projects.title: CX Library
projects.description: Graphics library based on SFML to make writing SFML easier and more comfortable. It handles event boilerplate, a lot of the math and element positioning for the user. Made with C++ and SFML.

projects.title: Astral Surge
projects.description: Speedrunning game focused on collecting all coins in time while evading traps and enemies. Features a fully-fledged level editor and endless mode! Made with C++ and SFML.

projects.title: Pong
projects.description: Pong. What more is there to say? Battle against a friend or go against a bot of 4 different difficulties. Made with C++ and SFML.

projects.title: Abyss Descendant
projects.description: Little terminal coin-collecting story game about fighting against an apocalypse. My first game made with C++.
